A photo taken with a 2400mm telephoto lens is attached.

Media notes: This pair of Virginia rail is copulating with the downy young foraging nearby.  The pair, which had 8 chicks in June (only two have been seen recently), is now mating again.
Male (on right) approaching female to mate.  This pair already had a clutch of 8 chicks in June and is now mating again.  There are two downy young left from the initial brood.
